task_completion.description: Navigate to the POS Terminal configuration window
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface is visible with the 'POS Terminal' window, menu item, or tab active.

task_completion.description: Set the POS Terminal Name to 'Express Lane 1'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the POS Terminal record form, the 'Name' text field contains exactly 'Express Lane 1'.

task_completion.description: Set the Organization to 'HQ' and Sales Representative to 'GardenAdmin'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Organization' field shows 'HQ' and the 'Sales Representative' field shows 'GardenAdmin'.

task_completion.description: Set the Price List to 'Sale Price List' and Warehouse to 'HQ Warehouse'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Price List' field shows 'Sale Price List' and the 'Warehouse' field shows 'HQ Warehouse'.

task_completion.description: Set the Cash Book to 'HQ Cash'
Ensure the Modify Price option is disabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Modify Price' checkbox is visibly unchecked (empty) in the form, or shows 'N' if viewed in a grid/table view.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web UI in a browser, rather than executing SQL queries or API calls in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the authentic iDempiere ERP interface (standard menus, tabs, layout) and not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste expected answers into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not simply type the task description or expected values into a text editor or terminal to fake completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a POS Terminal in iDempiere's GardenWorld database. Expected values: Name='Express Lane 1', Organization='HQ', Sales Representative='GardenAdmin', Price List='Sale Price List', Warehouse='HQ Warehouse', Cash Book='HQ Cash'. The 'Modify Price' option must be disabled, which visually corresponds to an unchecked checkbox in the UI (or 'N' in the database/grid view).
